activities_projects.title: Doubling a Square
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the diagonal of a square forms a square of double area
steps: Draw the diagonal of the square
Construct a square on the diagonal
Compare the area of the two squares
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns that the square on the diagonal has double the area of the original square

activities_projects.title: Paper Activity: Double Area Square
activities_projects.objective: Create a square with double the area using paper pieces
steps: Cut the second square into four triangles
Arrange the pieces around the first square
Observe the formation of a larger square

activities_projects.title: Halving a Square
activities_projects.objective: Construct a square with half the area of a given square
steps: Join the midpoints of each side
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how to reduce the area of a square by half

activities_projects.title: Isosceles Right Triangle Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Find the hypotenuse of an isosceles right triangle
steps: Draw a right triangle with both legs equal
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the relationship between equal sides and hypotenuse

activities_projects.title: Approximating √2
activities_projects.objective: Find approximate value of square root of 2
steps: Write squares of numbers between 1 and 2
Check which values are close to 2
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how to estimate irrational numbers

activities_projects.title: Right Triangle Square Combination
activities_projects.objective: Combine two squares of different sizes
steps: Draw two squares with different side lengths
Form a right triangle using the sides
Construct a square on the hypotenuse
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the relation a² + b² = c²

activities_projects.title: Pythagoras Verification
steps: Draw a right triangle with sides 3 cm and 4 cm
Calculate using formula a² + b² = c²
Compare the measured and calculated values

activities_projects.title: Scaled Triples Activity
steps: Check if the new triples satisfy a² + b² = c²

activities_projects.title: Real Life Right Triangle Problem
activities_projects.objective: Apply Pythagoras theorem to real situations
steps: Represent the situation using a triangle
